title: Fix TypeError in container's wait method
body:
For the doc change: list of string does not work with `environment` argument

Fixes No.3 in #184, `.wait()` returns an integer not a dictionary

comments.body: @rhatdan wondering why this was closed, as the issue is still present. As @sylencecc points out, the proposed fix is correct, but the type annotation for the return type of`wait()` is wrong and also needs fixing.

I don't remember but might have been lack of activity.

Care to open a new PR based on this?
